stillness_breathe.description: Nearly static frame with restrained atmospheric breathing.

vertical_glide.description: Slow editorial glide that preserves calm asymmetry.

prompts.global_base: Minimal surreal editorial composition. Quiet, reduced, asymmetrical image with one subtle breach in reality and high thumbnail clarity. The frame should feel paused, suspended, and slightly unresolved.

mode_overrides.final: Editorial finish pass. Keep the scene calm, legible, and emotionally compressed without adding detail.
mode_overrides.lock: Style-lock pass. Preserve the single breach, caption-safe breathing room, and painterly edge softness.
mode_overrides.sketch: Composition-search pass. Push negative space, off-center balance, and the controlled breach before refinement.

rules.asymmetry: One side must carry the visual weight while the opposite side stays mostly empty.
rules.color_fields: Use one dominant environmental color field and keep every secondary tone muted or neutral.
rules.implied_story: Hold the image in stillness so it feels like a paused system state with implied consequence.
rules.reduction: Strip forms to simple silhouettes and essential geometry only.
rules.selective_saturation: Reserve one saturated accent as a semantic signal rather than decoration.
rules.subject_anchor: The historical subject must remain legible but reduced to an emblematic silhouette.
rules.textural_restraint: Keep surfaces quiet with only slight painterly bleed at edges.
